items.name: select_all_pal
items.signature: pub fn select_all_pal(hwnd: u64) -> Result<(), AppError>
items.doc: Selects all text in the edit control of `hwnd`.

items.name: copy_pal
items.signature: pub fn copy_pal(hwnd: u64) -> Result<(), AppError>
items.doc: Copies the current selection to the clipboard.

items.name: cut_pal
items.signature: pub fn cut_pal(hwnd: u64) -> Result<(), AppError>
items.doc: Cuts the current selection to the clipboard.

items.name: paste_pal
items.signature: pub fn paste_pal(hwnd: u64) -> Result<(), AppError>
items.doc: Pastes clipboard content into the edit control.
